title: Generations-Structures
description: Structures Extension for the Generations Family of Mods
body:
Generations
[Generations Structures](https://generations.gg/index.php/Main_Page) is a sidemod that expands upon our [Generations Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/generations-core) mod built for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon). Our Generations Structures mod is an optional mod that requires [Generations Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/generations-core), it adds lots of various structures that naturally generate in your worlds. - Legendary Shrines - PokeMarts - PokeCenters - Loot Balloons - Gyms - Custom Villages with homes and streets - Floating Islands - and much more! We’re an open-source mod, compatible with both Forge and Fabric. For a smooth start, check out the 'How to Play' section towards the end for guidance on how to start playing!

Immersive Worlds
Play alongside with our [Generations Structures](https://modrinth.com/project/generations-structures) mod and immerse yourself in an enriched gameplay experience as we introduce over 50 carefully crafted [structures](https://generations.gg/index.php/Structures) that naturally populate your worlds. Explore freely, gather valuable loot, repurpose structures into homes, and even summon legendary Pokemon from an extensive array of unique structures scattered across diverse biomes. Elevate your adventure with the vibrant and dynamic landscapes awaiting your exploration.

Builders Paradise
For all you avid builders out there, we've got an absolute treat in store for you! Feast your eyes on an extensive range of building blocks, including Castle blocks, various colored Castle blocks, Chargestone Cave blocks, PokeCenter blocks, Invisible blocks, and the list just keeps on growing. [We added over 1,000 blocks](https://generations.gg/index.php/Blocks)! The possibilities are endless with our diverse selection of blocks

Summon Legendaries
Unearth the secrets hidden in your exploration as you stumble upon shrines dedicated to [Summoning Legendary Pokemon](https://generations.gg/index.php/Summoning_Legendaries) within some structures! In Generations, embark on mini quests to summon over 60 Legendary and Mythical Pokemon. From fishing in a lake with a Ruby Rod to exploring new biomes for Enigma Fragments, or even crafting and assembling a Prison Bottle with Hoopa Rings – the adventure is limitless. Alternatively, set out far and wide across various biomes to discover Legendary and Mythical Pokemon casually hanging out with their Pokemon companions. The thrill of encountering these rare creatures awaits you!

Planned Features
The following are just some of our planned features, with some coming as soon as next update! Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/generations), we host community polls to decide what features we should focus on - Ultra Space - Shadow Dimension - Raids, Outbreaks, Distortions - & More!

How to Play
If you're new to modding, we highly recommend you use our modpack. We have two versions, [Forge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-forge/) and [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-fabric/). If you need help deciding, check our [Getting Started](https://generations.gg/index.php/Getting_Started) guide on our Wiki. Modpacks are typically one-click installers to get you started instantly, simply download the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) and search Generations under the Modpacks tab, then hit install! Otherwise if you prefer a manual installation, download all of the dependencies listed on [our Downloads](https://generations.gg/index.php/Download) page and place them into your mods folder alongside the Generations jar. We highly advise you to refer to our [Installation Guide](https://generations.gg/index.php/Getting_Started) on our wiki for up-to-date information. No configs necessary, but if you wish to customize your gameplay please refer to our [Configuration Wiki Page](https://generations.gg/index.php/Configurations) on what all our various config settings do. Confused? Need help? You can join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/generations) or check out our [Getting Started](https://generations.gg/index.php/Getting_Started) guide on our Wiki

About Us
We're a team known previously as the Pixelmon Generations mod on 1.12.2 with millions upon millions of downloads over the span of 6+ years of development, Generations (now with a shortened name and rebrand) aims to add all features from the classic Pixelmon Generations mod you're familiar with into Generations for modern Minecraft and Cobblemon. Check out our [wiki](https://generations.gg/index.php/Main_Page) for more features and guides- there's just too many to list here! Just as with our source code, you can even create an account and edit/create wiki pages and guides on our website. Our whole project is by the players, for the players. Welcome to Generations and we hope you have fun! Yes, you can include us in your modpacks. We recommend joining our [Discord](https://discord.gg/generations) and advertising your modpacks in our modpack channel for greater visibility!

Links
Website/Wiki: https://generations.gg Discord/Support: https://discord.gg/generations Modpacks: [Forge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-forge/) / [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-fabric/) Our Mods: [Generations Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/generations-core) / [Generations Structures](https://modrinth.com/project/generations-structures) Source Code: https://github.com/GenerationsMod/Generations-Core
